title: radicula nasturtium
intro: Radicula nasturtium, also known as Indian cress or wascally walcot, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of radicula nasturtium include its ability to support digestive health, reduce fever, and act as a natural remedy for sore throats. Radicula nasturtium can be prepared as a herbal remedy through teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
